auth.organizationRequired: Your organisation context is missing from the current session.
auth.unauthorized: You must be signed in to access this resource.

dashboard.headline: ApertureCore
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Create view-only dashboards, stats, and cards from your own database.

builder.title: Add widget
builder.description: Pick a saved query, choose a plugin, and map query fields into widget inputs.
builder.editDescription: Update the saved query, plugin, and configuration for the selected widget.

query.label: Query
query.description: The saved SQL query that powers this widget.

plugin.label: Plugin
plugin.description: The renderer used to display the query result.

title.label: Widget title
title.description: Optional. Leave blank to generate a title from the query and plugin.

refresh.label: Refresh interval
refresh.description: How often this widget should refresh when the dashboard is open.

mapping.title: Plugin configuration
mapping.description: Map query fields and configure plugin inputs before rendering the widget.
mapping.emptyDescription: Plugin-specific inputs appear once a renderer has been selected.
mapping.noneDescription: This plugin can render the query result without additional configuration.

preview.loadingDescription: Running the selected query so the field mappings and widget preview stay in sync.

preview.title: Widget preview
preview.description: Preview the selected plugin with cached query results before adding it to the dashboard.
preview.empty: Select a query and plugin to preview a widget.

widgets.title: Dashboard widgets
widgets.description: Widgets reuse cached query results, can be rearranged on the grid, and refresh automatically while the dashboard stays open.

empty.title: No widgets yet
empty.description: Add a widget to connect a saved query to a dashboard plugin.

card.missingQuery: The saved query for this widget is no longer available.
card.queryMissingDescription: This widget references a saved query that could not be found in the current organisation.
card.loadingDescription: Running the saved query for this dashboard widget.

renderer.unknownDescription: This widget references a plugin that is not registered in the current app.
renderer.incompleteDescription: Complete all required plugin inputs before rendering this widget.

table.name: Table
table.description: Render raw query rows in a table.

visibleColumns.label: Visible columns
visibleColumns.description: Select the query columns to display. Leave empty to show every column.

table.emptyColumns: No columns are available for this query yet.
table.emptyRows: No rows were returned for this widget.

line-chart.name: Line chart
line-chart.description: Plot a numeric series against a label or date axis.
line-chart.emptyMapping: Map both axes to query fields to render this chart.
line-chart.emptyRows: This chart needs rows with numeric values in the selected measure field.

bar-chart.name: Bar chart
bar-chart.description: Compare a numeric series across categories.
bar-chart.emptyMapping: Map both fields to render this chart.
bar-chart.emptyRows: This chart needs rows with numeric values in the selected value field.

stat-card.name: Stat card
stat-card.description: Highlight a single metric from the first result row.
stat-card.emptyMapping: Choose a value field to render this stat card.
stat-card.emptyRows: This widget needs at least one query row.
stat-card.firstRowHint: Showing the first row returned by this query.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Redirecting to your OpenID Connect provider.
login.refreshHint: If nothing happens, refresh the page.

oidcNotConfigured.title: OIDC is not configured yet.
oidcNotConfigured.description: Set your provider endpoints and NUXT_OIDC_PROVIDERS_OIDC_CLIENT_ID in .env.development, then restart the app.

index.headline: Connections
index.title: Saved database connections
index.description: View and manage the database connections available to your organisation.

table.title: Connections
table.description: Saved database connections for your organisation.

empty.title: No saved connections yet
empty.description: Create a connection to start building dashboards from your database.

new.headline: Connections
new.title: New database connection
new.description: Add a database connection and verify that ApertureCore can reach it securely.

card.title: Connection details
card.description: Enter the credentials required to test the database connection.

connectionName.label: Connection name
connectionName.description: A friendly name for this connection.

edit.headline: Connections
edit.title: Edit database connection
edit.description: Update a saved database connection for your organisation.

card.title: Connection details
card.description: Update the connection fields, then retest before saving connectivity changes.

password.placeholder: Leave blank to keep the stored password
password.description: Leave blank to keep the stored password. It will be reused when testing or saving changes.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to view this database connection for this organisation.
errors.notFound: The selected connection could not be found.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while loading the saved database connection.

errors.unauthorized: You must be signed in to test a database connection.
errors.rateLimited: Too many database connection tests. Please wait and try again.
errors.bodyInvalid: Request body is not valid JSON.
errors.connectionNameInvalid: Connection name must be a string.
errors.portInvalid: Port must be a positive integer.
errors.savedConnectionNotFound: The saved connection could not be found.
errors.invalidInput: The database connection request is invalid.
errors.unsupportedDatabaseType: This database type is not supported yet.
errors.databaseNotFound: The specified database could not be found.
errors.connectionFailed: ApertureCore could not reach the database server.
errors.sslRequired: The database server requires SSL or compatible TLS settings.
errors.notImplemented: This database test is not implemented yet.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while testing the database connection.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to save database connections for this organisation.
errors.bodyInvalid: Request body is not valid JSON.
errors.connectionNameInvalid: Connection name must be a string.
errors.portInvalid: Port must be a positive integer.
errors.duplicateConnectionName: A connection with this name already exists for your organisation.
errors.duplicateConnectionTarget: A connection for this host and database already exists for your organisation.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while saving the database connection.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to update database connections for this organisation.
errors.bodyInvalid: Request body is not valid JSON.
errors.connectionNameInvalid: Connection name must be a string.
errors.portInvalid: Port must be a positive integer.
errors.passwordRequired: Password must be a string when provided.
errors.notFound: The selected connection could not be found.
errors.duplicateConnectionName: A connection with this name already exists for your organisation.
errors.duplicateConnectionTarget: A connection for this host and database already exists for your organisation.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while updating the database connection.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to view database connections for this organisation.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while loading saved database connections.

dialog.title: Delete connection
dialog.confirmationDescription: Enter the exact saved connection name to confirm deletion.

deleteLinkedQueries.label: Delete linked SQL queries too
deleteLinkedQueries.description: This preference will be applied once linked SQL query persistence is added.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to delete database connections for this organisation.
errors.bodyInvalid: Request body is not valid JSON.
errors.confirmationNameInvalid: Confirmation name must be a string.
errors.deleteLinkedQueriesInvalid: Delete linked SQL queries must be true or false.
errors.confirmationMismatch: The confirmation name did not match the selected connection.
errors.notFound: The selected connection could not be found.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while deleting the database connection.

index.headline: Queries
index.title: Saved SQL queries
index.description: View the saved SQL queries available to your organisation.

table.title: Queries
table.description: Saved SQL queries for your organisation.

empty.title: No saved SQL queries yet
empty.description: Create a saved SQL query to reuse it later.

new.headline: Queries
new.title: New saved SQL query
new.description: Create a saved SQL query for your organisation.

card.title: Query details
card.description: Choose a connection, test the SQL, and store the query securely.

emptyConnections.title: Create a connection first
emptyConnections.description: A saved SQL query must be linked to a saved database connection.

edit.headline: Queries
edit.title: Edit saved SQL query
edit.description: Update a saved SQL query for your organisation.

card.title: Query details
card.description: Review the encrypted SQL, test it again if needed, and save the updated query.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to edit SQL queries for this organisation.
errors.notFound: The requested saved SQL query could not be found.
errors.persistenceUnavailable: Saved SQL queries are temporarily unavailable.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while loading the saved SQL query.

queryName.label: Query name
queryName.description: Give this query a clear name for your organisation.

connectionId.label: Connection
connectionId.description: Choose the saved database connection this query runs against.

sql.label: SQL
sql.description: This SQL is encrypted at rest and only decrypted when explicitly loaded for editing.

results.title: Query results
results.description: Showing a sample of up to {rowLimit} rows from the current query test.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to test SQL queries for this organisation.
errors.rateLimited: Too many SQL query tests. Please wait and try again.
errors.bodyInvalid: Request body is not valid JSON.
errors.savedConnectionNotFound: The selected saved connection could not be found.
errors.unsupportedDatabaseType: This database type is not supported yet.
errors.databaseNotFound: The specified database could not be found.
errors.connectionFailed: ApertureCore could not reach the database server.
errors.sslRequired: The database server requires SSL or compatible TLS settings.
errors.queryRejected: Only a single read-only SELECT query can be tested.
errors.queryFailed: The SQL query could not be executed.
errors.persistenceUnavailable: Saved SQL query testing is temporarily unavailable.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while testing the SQL query.
Unexpected error while running the saved SQL query.

errors.bodyInvalid: Request body is not valid JSON.
errors.queryNameInvalid: Query name must be a string.

errors.sqlNotReadOnly: Only a single read-only SELECT query can be saved.
errors.notFound: The selected connection could not be found.
errors.duplicateQueryName: A query with this name already exists for the selected connection.
errors.persistenceUnavailable: Saved SQL queries are temporarily unavailable.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while saving the SQL query.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to update SQL queries for this organisation.

errors.duplicateQueryName: A query with this name already exists for the selected connection.
errors.persistenceUnavailable: Saved SQL queries are temporarily unavailable.
